description: Terminal shows: "$ npm run dev" followed by POST requests to "/api/proctoring/sessions/69a666470bf9b43106e8a511/consent" with IP: ::1 and body containing a token and screens count.

Browser open to 'http://localhost:5173/ProctoringTest'. Page titled 'Proctoring Test Page' with text: 'Dev-only page to test screen recording and transcript generation'. Recording in progress with stats showing 'Video Chunks: 0', 'Screenshots Uploaded: 0', and 'Session: 69a66467b49f4316be8a51d'.

Claude AI chat. Assistant discussed codebase changes: 'Reverted detail: "high" back to detail: "auto". Reverted controller and generator to pass no extra args to detectRegions()'. The region detector is now using 'text strip sampling via Tesseract + GPT-40-mini vision call with text hints only'.

Editor open with file 'mock_transcript_raw.jsonl'. Visible content includes JSON structure with timestamps and descriptions of code editor activities, such as 'Code editor. New line 3 added: ' for (EiEIE EEE' and 'Code editor. Line 4 added: ' if nuiiEiEs'.

Browser remains on 'http://localhost:5173/ProctoringTest'. Page continues to show 'Proctoring Test Page' with recording stats: 'Video Chunks: 0', 'Screenshots Uploaded: 1', and 'Session: 69a646fb9a7e4391beada551d4f6a6e2'.
